case_title: WILSON MA VS. MUTEKI, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, WILSON AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT MUTEKI, INC. LUI, JIM KIM FAI AN INDIVIDUAL LUI, ROY AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, WILSON AN INDIVIDUAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUTEKI, INC. LUI, JIM KIM FAI AN INDIVIDUAL LUI, ROY AN INDIVIDUAL $27,522.38 PRINCIPAL, $708.55 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,680.93, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, WILSON AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO ASSIGNEE DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS LABOR COMMISSIONER'S OFFICE
